response.feedback: The code is well-structured following the principles of Separation of Concerns. The architecture is delineated into models, repositories, services, and controllers, ensuring clear responsibilities across layers. Validation logic is appropriately abstracted into a separate validator for request data.
suggestions: Implement pagination for list APIs, as this will improve performance when dealing with large data sets.
Ensure environment variable validation is implemented for app stability.
Add transaction handling in the repository when performing multiple write operations.
